chat.author: Russ Housley
chat.text: @meetech: He registered for on-site, but got sick so is doing remote

chat.author: Ben Campbell
chat.text: @meetecho: I asked to change from on-site to remote. Looks like they may have deregistered me.

chat.author: Lorenzo Miniero
chat.text: We relayed this info, so that they can investigate

chat.author: Ben Campbell
chat.text: I'm in now. I had to reregister.

chat.author: Ben Campbell
chat.text: PPS is strong in the STIR 007 lore

chat.author: Ben Campbell
chat.text: oop, sorry, swapped the S and K in my head

chat.author: Roger Anderson
chat.text: Is there currently a DNS lookup in a sip call flow that involves stir/shaken? If not, would a DNS lookup be a problem with the volume of calls?
